1036:51D6.label: sb_test_and_init
1036:51D6.comment: Resets DSP, allocates DMA buffer, programs DMA1, starts playback, waits for IRQ; returns 0 on success or error code on failure

1036:532B.label: sb_dsp_write
1036:532B.comment: Polls DSP write buffer busy bit (port 0x22C bit 7) then writes AL to DSP

1036:5341.label: sb_dsp_reset
1036:5341.comment: Pulses DSP reset (port 0x226), polls read-status (0x22E), reads 0xAA from data port (0x22A)

1036:5393.label: sb_irq_handler
1036:5393.comment: SB DSP IRQ handler installed at IVT[IRQ5]; reads mixer 0x82 to distinguish 8-bit vs 16-bit DMA, chains to saved handler

1036:5402.label: sb_irq_to_ivt_offset
1036:5402.comment: Converts SB IRQ number in [sb_irq_num] to IVT byte offset; returns offset in BX

1036:541C.label: sb_unmask_irq
1036:541C.comment: Clears the SB IRQ bit in PIC1 IMR; saves original mask to [sb_old_irq_mask]

1036:544D.label: sb_install_irq_handler
1036:544D.comment: Saves original DSP IRQ vector and installs new handler at IVT[sb_irq_to_ivt_offset]

1036:5477.label: sb_install_int2_handler
1036:5477.comment: Saves original INT 2 vector (IVT[0x0008]) and installs replacement handler at 1036:53D6

1036:549E.label: sb_restore_irq_mask
1036:549E.comment: Restores PIC1 IMR to the value saved in [sb_old_irq_mask]

1036:54BB.label: sb_uninstall_irq_handler
1036:54BB.comment: Restores original DSP IRQ vector from [sb_saved_irq_off/seg]

1036:54FA.label: sb_setup_dma
1036:54FA.comment: Programs DMA1 for SB transfer: clear flip-flop, set mode, write base addr/page/count

1036:5565.label: sb_set_dma_channel
1036:5565.comment: Stores DMA addr/count/page port numbers for the given channel into [sb_dma_addr_port] etc.

1036:561D.label: sb_alloc_dma_buffer
1036:561D.comment: Allocates DMA bounce buffer (256 paragraphs = 4 KB) via DOS INT 21h/48h

1036:564F.label: sb_free_dma_buffer
1036:564F.comment: Frees DMA buffer allocated by sb_alloc_dma_buffer via DOS INT 21h/49h

1036:565C.label: sb_start_playback
1036:565C.comment: Sends DSP commands to begin audio DMA output: set time constant (0x40), start 8-bit DMA (0xC4 + mode + size)

1036:56AF.label: sb_exit_auto_init
1036:56AF.comment: Sends DSP command 0xDA (exit auto-init DMA mode) then busy-waits ~32 cycles for DSP to settle

1036:56CB.label: sb_ack_interrupt
1036:56CB.comment: Reads DSP read-status port (0x22E), sends continue command (0x45), sends PIC EOI

1036:56F7.label: sb_mask_dma_channel
1036:56F7.comment: Masks DMA channel via DMA1 single mask register (port 0x0A); OR channel with 0x04 sets mask bit

1036:570C.label: sb_unmask_dma_channel
1036:570C.comment: Unmasks DMA channel via DMA1 single mask register (port 0x0A); AND with 0x03 clears mask bit

1036:5721.label: sb_fill_silence
1036:5721.comment: Fills DMA buffer with 0x8080 (silence for unsigned 8-bit PCM) using rep stosw

1036:574B.label: sb_init_video_state
1036:574B.comment: Reads CRT base address from BIOS data area (0040:0063), stores CRT status port and video segment

ports.000C: DMA1 byte flip-flop (clear before 16-bit addr/count writes)
ports.022E: SB DSP read status / 8-bit IRQ acknowledge (base+E)

lineComments.1036:52B7: zero sb_dma_done_flag before starting DMA — ISR sets it non-zero on completion
lineComments.1036:52C8: save current BIOS tick counter for 16-tick timeout
lineComments.1036:52CF: poll sb_dma_done_flag; also check elapsed BIOS ticks against 16-tick timeout
lineComments.1036:52EB: timeout: DMA block never completed — sb_dma_done_flag stayed 0
lineComments.1036:5503: mask off lower bit of address so buffer stays within one DMA page
lineComments.1036:5505: clear DMA address flip-flop before writing 16-bit addr/count as two bytes
lineComments.1036:550D: DMA mode 0x59 = auto-init | read (playback) | single-cycle | channel 1
lineComments.1036:5377: DSP responds with 0xAA after successful reset
lineComments.1036:539B: read mixer reg 0x82 = IRQ status: bit 0 = 8-bit DMA IRQ, bit 1 = 16-bit DMA IRQ
lineComments.1036:53A6: mixer reg 0x82 reads 0x00 in this trace: bit 0 (8-bit DMA IRQ) clear, so ACK block at 53B6 is skipped
lineComments.1036:53B2: skip 8-bit DMA ACK block if bit 0 clear; that block sets sb_dma_done_flag and reads port 0x22E
lineComments.1036:53BF: if sb_saved_irq_off == 0 (no saved handler), take no-chain EOI path at 53C6; else pushf+call far simulates chained INT
lineComments.1036:5708: AL = (channel | 0x04): bit 2 set = mask this channel
lineComments.1036:571D: AL = (channel & 0x03): bit 2 clear = unmask this channel
lineComments.1036:5743: fill DMA buffer with 0x8080: silence for unsigned 8-bit stereo PCM

gaps.1036:53B6: 8-bit DMA IRQ ACK block — reads port 0x22E (8-bit DMA ACK) and writes 1 to sb_dma_done_flag; not executed in this trace because mixer reg 0x82 returned 0x00 (emulator bug; fixed)
gaps.1036:53C6: ISR no-chain EOI path — executes when sb_saved_irq_off == 0 (no saved handler); sends PIC EOI and issues IRET directly without chaining
gaps.1036:53D6: INT 2 replacement handler body — installed by sb_install_int2_handler at IVT[0x0008]; handles spurious PIC1 cascade and chains to saved INT 2 vector; 44 bytes
